title: R7S 120w = 150w 78mm Halogen Bulb Floodlight Security Light Linear Bulbs R7S J28 Flood Light (Pack of 2)
features: [ WIDELY USED ] Illuminate your surroundings with superior quality Linear Halogen Bulbs, perfect for floor lamps, wall fittings, garden floodlights, security lights, showrooms, stages, studios, landscapes, and suitable for home, shop, office, work, and security lighting, providing bright, clear light to enhance visibility and create a welcoming atmosphere.

[ QUALITY PRODUCT] Saving Linear Halogen Lamps With Heat-Resistant Iodine Tungsten Filament. Mercury-Free Eco-friendly, CE Approved With Its High Quality, No Lead Or Mercury, No UV Or IR Radiation. UK CA Approved. Our bulbs are manufactured in the same factories as the top lighting brands, thus ensuring exceptional quality for our customers.
[ INSTALLATION ] Linear Halogen Bulbs Can Easily Installed With Standard Double Ended R7s Base. No Extra Tools Needed.
[ SPECIFICATION ] 120W = 150W Eco Halogen Linear R7S, J78, 78mm, 2250 lumens, 2900K Warm White, Dimmable
description: Product Description Standard Fit Designed with an R7S J78 linear base and 78mm length , compatible with a wide range of floodlights and security light fixtures. Warm White Light Emits a cozy 2900K warm white glow , ideal for outdoor and security lighting. Flicker-Free & Dimmable Ensures smooth, flicker-free illumination and is fully dimmable for customizable lighting. Halogen Linear Floodlight Bulb R7S J78, 78mm, 120W = 150W Eco Halogen is the perfect lighting solution for floodlights, security lights, and other high-performance fixtures. This energy-efficient halogen bulb delivers 2250 lumens of bright, clear light, equivalent to a traditional 150W bulb, while consuming only 120W of power.
